_meta.session: BMT batch 1 — Priority 2 safety canon. Benchmarks registered for future ingestion; no frontier-2026 scores currently published across HarmBench / StrongREJECT / AIR-Bench. Sources to monitor: Gray Swan Arena, Stanford HELM Safety, UK AISI inspect_evals, AI Safety China Frontier Risk Monitoring.

benchmarks.name: HarmBench
benchmarks.description: CAIS standardized red-teaming evaluation with 510 harmful behaviors across 7 categories. ASR against automated red-team methods (GCG, PAIR, TAP). Lower is safer.

benchmarks.name: StrongREJECT
benchmarks.description: 313 forbidden prompts with rubric-based auto-grader distinguishing genuine refusals from capability-limited refusals. Fraction of prompts where model produces actionable harmful response under jailbreak. Lower is safer.

benchmarks.name: AIR-Bench 2024
benchmarks.description: Stanford CRFM/Tsinghua 5,694 prompts spanning 314 fine-grained risk categories from 8 government regulations + 16 corporate AI-use policies. Average safe-refusal rate. Higher is safer.
